channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 25.5%.

item.title:
Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: Starmer's strongest defence was the division of his opponents. But Streetings letter showed the right and the left of the party are now coalescing around a process. That suggests it's basically game over.
inews.co.u...
item.description:
Starmer's strongest defence was the division of his opponents. But Streetings letter showed the right and the left of the party are now coalescing around a process. That suggests it's basically game over.
inews.co.u...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Burnham could stand in leadership race as path to Westminster emerges
item.description: Starmer latest: Burnham could stand in leadership race as path to Westminster emerges

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour’s Josh Simons to stand down as MP so Andy Burnham can ‘drive the change our country is crying out for’ - UK politics live
item.description: Labour’s Josh Simons to stand down as MP so Andy Burnham can ‘drive the change our country is crying out for’ - UK politics live

item.title: LabourList: Josh Simons to stand down as MP to allow Burnham return to Parliament
item.description: Josh Simons to stand down as MP to allow Burnham return to Parliament

item.title: FT UK Politics: Andy Burnham offered Labour seat to challenge Starmer
item.description: Andy Burnham offered Labour seat to challenge Starmer

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Josh Simons stepping down as MP for Makerfield for Andy Burnham. Quite a tricky parachute, that seat:
item.description: Josh Simons stepping down as MP for Makerfield for Andy Burnham. Quite a tricky parachute, that seat:

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour MP to stand down to allow Burnham run for byelection amid leadership row
item.description: Labour MP to stand down to allow Burnham run for byelection amid leadership row

item.title: Bluesky · @pippacrerar.bsky.social: BREAKING: Andy Burnham now has a route back to parliament after Josh Simons, MP for Makerfield announced he would stand down, triggering a byelection, and putting the Greater Manchester mayor in contention to become t...
item.description: BREAKING: Andy Burnham now has a route back to parliament after Josh Simons, MP for Makerfield announced he would stand down, triggering a byelection, and putting the Greater Manchester mayor in contention to become t...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Every Labour MP who has demanded Starmer quit as number reaches 96
item.description: Every Labour MP who has demanded Starmer quit as number reaches 96

item.title: Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: BREAKING - Josh Simons to stand down in Makerfield so Andy Burnham can run for parliament
item.description: BREAKING - Josh Simons to stand down in Makerfield so Andy Burnham can run for parliament
